name: Ethiopian Lentils
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Dried lentils; picked over - washed
3/4 cup Anaheim green peppers; seeded and chopped
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 6 cups of water to a boil in a large pot.
2. Add the dried lentils and cook for 5 minutes.
3. Drain the lentils, reserving the liquid.
4. In a 4-quart saucepot, sauté the Anaheim peppers and onions in spiced butter until the onions are tender.
5. Stir in the lentils, reserved liquid (about 2 cups), grated ginger, garlic, Berbere sauce, and black pepper to taste.
6. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
7. Cover and cook over low heat for 35-40 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
